notes: New app chrome defaults to ert-*.
rt-* is legacy and allowed only inside explicitly listed islands.

timelineRendererSvg.description: Legacy Radial Timeline SVG/rendering primitives. This island intentionally and permanently uses rt-* selectors and --rt-* vars — these class names are emitted into the rendered SVG and are the renderer's stable contract. They are NOT migration debt. See docs/engineering/standards/css-namespace-policy.md.

timelineChromeTs.description: Legacy Timeline chrome classes still tolerated in TimeLineView.ts. New chrome should use ert-timeline-* instead of expanding this set.

rtCleanFiles.description: CSS files that have been fully migrated off rt-* and must stay that way. css-drift-check.mjs hard-FAILs on any rt-* selector here (apr-rt-* branding is exempt). This is the backslide guard the count-based WARN ratchet cannot provide on its own. When a file finishes migration, add it here.
